name: Oat & Cashew Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a food processor or blender, grind together the oats and cashews. Be careful not to over-grind, as this will result in a butter-like consistency.
2. Add the salt, oil, and water to the ground mixture, then blend thoroughly until smooth.
3. Pour the batter into a preheated waffle iron.
4. Cook for a few minutes until cooked through.
5. Serve with plenty of maple syrup.
